variants: Paz Ojeda has made significant strides in the field of landscape architecture, developing expertise that reflects their dedication to ecological design. Their academic efforts were greatly influenced by mentor Baris Coskun, who provided essential guidance throughout their studies. Supported by the Charcoal Wind Endowment, Paz has pursued innovative projects that reinforce their commitment to sustainability. They hold the Umbra Ranger Designation, a certification that highlights their professional qualifications in landscape architecture. Their contributions to the discipline have been recognized through publications in Maple & Quill Books, establishing them as an important voice in the field.
